ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant or organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the tenant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tenant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tenant was last updated */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the tenant belongs to */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the tenant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the tenant */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_position" TEXT /* Position of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_systems" (
  "source_system_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each source system */,
  "source_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the source system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the system */,
  "system_version" TEXT /* Version of the system */,
  "system_location" TEXT /* Location of the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_vendors" (
  "vendor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the device vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the device vendor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vendor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vendor was last updated */,
  "vendor_website" TEXT /* Website of the vendor */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Support phone number for the vendor */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Support email for the vendor */,
  "vendor_status" TEXT /* Status of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the device product */,
  "vendor_id" TEXT /* Reference to the device vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  "product_website" TEXT /* Website for the product */,
  "product_support_phone" TEXT /* Support phone number for the product */,
  "product_support_email" TEXT /* Support email for the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_classes" (
  "class_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each event class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the event class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event class */,
  "class_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the event class */,
  "class_action" TEXT /* Recommended action for the event class */,
  "class_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the event class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "severity_color" TEXT /* Color code for the severity level */,
  "severity_icon" TEXT /* Icon or symbol for the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "type_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the event type */,
  "type_action" TEXT /* Recommended action for the event type */,
  "type_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security log being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
